html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: The Gorge
Cooking stations are obtained by purchasing Kitchen sets from Mumsy and Billy. They can be installed on Firepit and work as an structure. They are essential for cooking various The Gorge Recipes.

Contents

  • 1 Pot Hanger
  • 2 Oven
  • 3 Small Grill
  • 4 Large Grill
  • 5 Trivia

Pot Hanger

Pot HangerItem

Pot Hanger is a station dropped by the Cookpot Kit. Dropped as an item, once planted over a fire pit, works as a structure. A Cookpot, a Large Cookpot or a Syrup Pot can be hung on it to cook. If Wilson is standing next to the hanger where something is being cooked, the cooking efficiency improves.

Oven

OvenItem

The Oven is a station that drops from the Oven Kit. Dropped as an item, once planted over a fire pit, works as a structure. A Small or Large Casserole Dish can be put in it to cook. If Wolfgang is standing next to the oven in which something is being cooked, the cooking efficiency improves.

Small Grill

Small GrillItem

Small Grill is a station that drops from the Grill Kit. Dropped as an item, once planted over a fire pit, works as a structure. Unlike Pot Hanger and Oven, it does not require any additional containers for cooking, the grill itself is a container: to start cooking, put the ingredients into the grill and make a fire.

The grill is for frying. Various burgers, steaks, etc. are cooked on the grill. The Small Grill has 3 slots for ingredients.

If something is on the grill while the fire is burning, the ingredients inside it will slowly fry. The cooking time depends on the intensity of the fire in the fire pit and whether Wendy is standing next to the grill. If the ingredients inside the grill match one of the recipes, steam will come out of the grill, signaling that the dish is ready.

However, if the dish is overcooked or the ingredients inside the grill do not fit any of the recipes, smoke starts to come out of the grill and it turns into a Burnt Food.

Large Grill

Large GrillItem

The Large Grill is an improved version of the Small Grill: it has 4 cells instead of 3, which allows to cook more complex dishes. Wendy also increases the cooking efficiency of the large grill by standing next to it. Unlike other large containers, a Large Grill can only be obtained through trade with Pipton, in a Large Grill Kit.

Aside from its increased ingredient capacity, the Large Grill functions identically to a Small Grill.

Trivia

  • Pot Hanger later gets added in game as one of the skin of Drying Rack.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Trạm nấu ăn có được bằng cách mua Bộ bếp từ Mumsy và Billy. Chúng có thể được cài đặt trên Firepit và hoạt động như một cấu trúc. Chúng rất cần thiết để nấu các Công thức nấu ăn khác nhau của The Gorge.
title: Cooking stations
wikitext:
{{Exclusivity|Don't Starve Together}}{{Event|The Gorge}}
